title: Rename device - new name on the Support device card
scenario: Renamed device name is not reflected on the Support device card in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a connected device that supports renaming.
2. Tap the device name at the top of the Home screen to edit it, then enter a new name and confirm.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
5. Locate the device card under the Support section and observe the displayed device name.
expected: The device card in the Support section displays the new (renamed) device name.
